title: swsc: A sitewise UCE partitioner
author: Ryan A. Hagenson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: swsc reduces the combinatorially explosive search space for effective ultraconserved element (UCE) partitioning schemes through use of a candidate window plus extension procedure. It is a development on the best UCE partitioning procedure described by Tagliacollo, V. A., & Lanfear, R. (2018) ( https://doi.org/10.1093/molbev/msy069 ).
steps_raw: swsc reduces the combinatorially explosive search space for effective ultraconserved element (UCE) partitioning schemes through use of a candidate window plus extension procedure. It is a development on the best UCE partitioning procedure described by Tagliacollo, V. A., & Lanfear, R. (2018) ( https://doi.org/10.1093/molbev/msy069 ).
